validate.notes: Fixed test_outputs.py regex in test_generated_tools_record_has_entry. The original regex used [^}]+ which failed when matching the GENERATED_TOOLS object because the pattern couldn't handle content with braces in TypeScript type annotations (Record<string, () => ToolBase<ZodObjectAny>>). Changed to use non-greedy match [\s\S]*? instead. All 24 tests now pass on gold, 16 fail on NOP as expected. Rubric judge requires taskforge module (Harbor internal) which is not available in this environment - skipped as optional check.
